subject: PLC module inquiry
message: We need a Siemens compatible PLC for a packaging machine. Required 16DI and 8DO, 24V DC, RS485 communication. Please recommend a suitable model.

subject: Need PLC for conveyor
message: Hello, we are looking for a PLC for conveyor control. Around 32 digital inputs and 32 outputs, Ethernet preferred. Quantity may be 5 pcs.

subject: PLC expansion module
message: Do you have a digital input expansion module for X200 series? We need 16DI for sensor signals.

subject: Mitsubishi replacement
message: Can you offer a cost-effective alternative to Mitsubishi FX series PLC for a small machine? Need RS485 and Modbus RTU.

subject: VFD for pump
message: We need 2.2kW VFD for water pump, 380V three phase, Modbus RTU required. Please suggest model.

subject: Inverter inquiry
message: Do you have 7.5kW inverter for fan application? Input voltage is 380V. Quantity 3 pcs.

subject: 220V VFD
message: Looking for 1.5kW single phase 220V VFD for small conveyor machine. Need RS485.

subject: VFD selection
message: Please help select a drive for motor speed control. Motor power is not confirmed yet, application is conveyor.

subject: 7 inch HMI
message: We need a 7 inch HMI with Ethernet and Modbus TCP for packaging line. It should communicate with PLC.

subject: HMI panel
message: Do you have 10.1 inch HMI, 1024x600 or better, with RS485 and Ethernet? Quantity 2 pcs.

subject: Small HMI
message: Looking for 4.3 inch HMI for pump controller. RS485 Modbus RTU is enough.

subject: HMI compatibility
message: We want HMI compatible with Modbus TCP PLC. Screen size not decided, maybe 7 or 10 inch.

subject: Industrial switch
message: We need 8-port gigabit industrial switch for PLC network, unmanaged is ok. Wide temperature preferred.

subject: Managed switch with fiber
message: Looking for managed industrial switch with 8 RJ45 ports and 2 fiber ports, gigabit speed.

subject: PoE industrial switch
message: Do you have 8-port PoE industrial switch for machine vision cameras? Managed type preferred.

subject: Factory network switch
message: We need 16-port unmanaged industrial switch for cabinet PLC communication, 24V DC power input.
